payload.message: Check for pending signatures at http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/documents/. If found, trigger wdk-enclave agent to prepare signing payload. Report status via nodes tool.

jobs.name: Recurring Liabilities Background Sweeper
jobs.description: 2:00 AM - Auto-sign recurring corporate liabilities within treasury limits

payload.message: Execute While I Sleep cycle: 1. Query IFRS_Backend for recurring bills due within 24 hours. 2. Validate each against treasury policies (daily_recurring_liabilities limit: $50,000). 3. For each valid bill, request wdk-enclave to sign via /api/sign. 4. Relay signed UserOperation to Node Web3 Server. 5. Log all transactions to audit trail.

jobs.name: Bi-Weekly Payroll Processor
jobs.description: Every other Friday at 2:00 PM UTC - Batch sign salary disbursements

payload.message: Execute payroll signing: 1. Query IFRS_Backend for EmployeeSalaryLine records marked as 'pending_disbursement'. 2. Aggregate into single batch_payroll intent. 3. Validate total against policy limit ($100,000 per cycle). 4. Request wdk-enclave to sign batch UserOperation. 5. Relay to Node Web3 Server for bundling. 6. Update employee records with tx hash.

jobs.name: Tax Accrual Escrow Monitor
jobs.description: Monthly tax compliance check - Fund escrow when thresholds reached

payload.message: Execute tax escrow funding: 1. Calculate accumulated tax accrual from latest FinancialPeriod. 2. If exceeds threshold (e.g., $10,000 USDT equivalent), request wdk-enclave to sign fund_tax_escrow intent. 3. Validate against policy (maxPerDeposit: $75,000). 4. Relay to Node Web3 Server. 5. Record escrow deposit in ledger with reference to tax code.

jobs.name: Surplus Cash Yield Deployment
jobs.description: Weekly surplus cash deployment to yield vaults

payload.message: Execute yield deployment: 1. Calculate current cash balance from IFRS Balance Sheet. 2. Apply minimum reserve ratio (25%). 3. If surplus > threshold, request wdk-enclave to sign deploy_yield intent. 4. Validate against policy (maxPerDeployment: $50,000). 5. Relay to Node Web3 Server for yield vault deposit. 6. Update cash flow forecasts.

jobs.name: Quarterly Shareholder Dividend Payout
jobs.description: Q-end distribution of profits to shareholders

payload.message: Execute dividend distribution: 1. Query latest FinancialPeriod for Net Income and Shareholder records. 2. Calculate pro-rata dividend per shareholder. 3. Aggregate into distribute_dividends intent. 4. Validate each transaction against vendor_settlement policy. 5. Request wdk-enclave to sign batch UserOperation. 6. Relay to Node Web3 Server. 7. Record dividend distributions in equity section of ledger.

jobs.name: Daily Treasury Policy Compliance Audit
jobs.description: 6:00 AM UTC - Verify all transactions comply with deterministic limits

payload.message: Execute compliance audit: 1. Query IFRS_Backend for all transactions from past 24 hours. 2. Cross-check each against treasury policies (daily_recurring_liabilities, vendor_settlement, payroll_batch, tax_escrow, yield_deployment limits). 3. Flag any violations for human review. 4. Generate compliance report. 5. Alert if any policy breaches detected.
